Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWBALANCO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName &BalSts = nullvalue(&BalSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Balanço de Estoque' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &BalDta_To.IsEmpty() or &BalDta.IsEmpty() &BalDta_To = serverdate() &BalDta = &BalDta_To - 90 EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CancelarBalanco = !'' If (BalSts = Status_Pedido.Aberto) &CancelarBalanco.Class = !'Attribute' Else &CancelarBalanco.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &EditarProdutos.Clear() &EditarProdutos.AddItem(0, 'Editar Balanço') If (BalSts = Status_Pedido.Aberto) &EditarProdutos.AddItem(1, 'Editar Capa') Endif If (BalSts = Status_Pedido.Aberto) &EditarProdutos.AddItem(2, 'Modo Normal') Endif If (BalSts = Status_Pedido.Aberto) &EditarProdutos.AddItem(3, 'Modo Leitora') Endif If (BalSts <> Status_Pedido.Aberto) &EditarProdutos.AddItem(4, 'Visualizar') Endif If &EditarProdutos.Count = 1 &EditarProdutos.Class = !'Invisible' Else &EditarProdutos.Class = !'Attribute' EndIf &FecharBalanco = !'' If (BalSts = Status_Pedido.Aberto or BalSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO) &FecharBalanco.Class = !'Attribute' Else &FecharBalanco.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &ImprimirBalanco = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if BalSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO &FecharBalanco = !'' &FecharBalanco.TooltipText = "Cancelar Itens" EndIF BalSts.ForeColor = RGB(0,160,40) If BalSts <> Status_Pedido.Aberto BalSts.ForeColor = RGB(160,0,40) EndIF EndEvent Event &EditarProdutos.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &EditarProdutos = 1 Do 'Do Update' Case &EditarProdutos = 2 Do 'Do ModoNormal' Case &EditarProdutos = 3 Do 'Do ModoLeitora' Case &EditarProdutos = 4 Do 'Do Visualizar' EndCase &EditarProdutos = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &FecharBalanco.Click Do Case Case BalSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('FECHARBALANCOESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) if &AutNiv > 0 VerificaLoteInformadoBalanco.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, BalCod, 0, 0, &IsTodosInformados) if &IsTodosInformados = TRUE //TUDO CERTO /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ FecharBalanco_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else //AJUSTAR ERROS wpInformaLotesFaltantesBalanco.Link('WWBALANCO', EmpCod, FilCod, BalCod) Endif Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar a Balanço de Estoque. [FECHARBALANCOESTOQUE]') EndiF Case BalSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO wpBalancoItemFechado.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, BalCod) Otherwise msg('Somente Balanço Aberto pode ser Fechado!') EndCase EndEvent Event FecharBalanco_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpFecharBalanco.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, BalCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event FecharBalanco_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ImprimirBalanco.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpImprimirBalanco.PopUp(EmpCod, FilCod, BalCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Balanco.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(FilCod), nullvalue(BalCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImprimirBalanconovio' wpImprimirbalanco.Popup(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?07b9c0fb-8563-4763-bb27-98ff3341caa0' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Update' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Balanco.Call(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, FilCod, BalCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ModoNormal' wpBalancoItem.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, BalCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ModoLeitora' wpBalancoItemCodigoBarras.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, BalCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Visualizar' viewBalanco.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, BalCod, '') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"BALDTA" &BalDta.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &BalDta_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"BALCOD" &BalCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"BALSTS" &BalSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"BALTIP" &BalTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"BALDTA", "", not (&BalDta.IsEmpty() AND &BalDta_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &BalDta.ToString().Trim(), &BalDta_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"BALCOD", "", not &BalCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &BalCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"BALSTS", "", not &BalSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &BalSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"BALTIP", "", not &BalTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &BalTip, '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Balanco" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &CancelarBalanco.Click If BalSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO wpCancelaBalanco.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, BalCod) Refresh Else msg('Somente Balanço Aberto pode ser Cancelado!') EndIf EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
